prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 11582→12622→11859→16603→18502，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其 2024 年新高考改革后位次大幅后移约 1900 名，2025 年进一步后移约 1900 名，近两年累计后移约 6900 名，2025 年基准约 18502 名；该校在江西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年 37 人、2022 年 37 人、2023 年 35 人、2024 年 44 人、2025 年 50 人，呈逐年扩招态势；2026 年计划 56 人，较 2025 年扩招 12%，招生名额增加使竞争进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年约第 90–101 名（2026 年约第 101 名），排名略有波动但整体稳定在中游偏上水平；2023 年曾出现师德师风类负面事件（偏负面评价），2026 年声誉数据中该校未进入主要舆情学校列表；抖音热度排名第 84 位，评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业持续高热推荐，安徽大学在江西省理科招生专业以计算机、电子信息、集成电路等热门方向为主，推高整体报考竞争；江西省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 474900 人，较 2025 年（约 472480 人）略有增加，物理类考生估算约 267800 人，竞争基数扩大；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，与江西省相邻，属于跨省招生，在地域偏好上无明显优势或劣势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划扩招 12% 加剧竞争、江西省考生总数略有增加以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热等因素，在 2025 年基准 18502 名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约 19884 名，区间 19384–20384 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 11582→12622→11859→16603→18502, showing a continuous backward trend overall, especially after the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly shifted backward by about 1900 places, and further shifted backward by about 1900 places in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6900 places in the last two years, and a 2025 baseline of about 18502 places; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Jiangxi Province: 37 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 50 in 2025, showing a trend of gradual expansion; the 2026 plan is 56, an increase of 12% compared to 2025, and the increase in enrollment quotas further intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Rankings in recent years approximately 90–101 (2026 approximately 101), rankings fluctuate slightly but overall stable at the upper-middle level; in 2023, there was a negative incident related to teacher ethics (negative evaluation), and in 2026 reputation data, the university did not enter the main public opinion school list; Douyin popularity ranking 84th, evaluation 'average', short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, no obvious signal of increased application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other popular science majors continue to be highly recommended; Anhui University's science admissions in Jiangxi Province mainly include computer science, electronic information, integrated circuits and other popular directions, pushing up overall application competition; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 474,900, slightly increased from 2025 (about 472,480), with physics category candidates estimated at about 267,800, expanding the competition base; Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious advantage or disadvantage in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 12% expansion of the 2026 plan intensifying competition, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, and the continued high popularity of computer/electronic information and other popular majors, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 18502; the predicted minimum ranking is about 19884, with a range of 19384–20384.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 19384–20384, it is recommended to take Tier 2 majors as the main application range, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 19384), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Electronic Information Engineering and Integrated Circuits; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 20384), you should mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, while considering relatively less popular but higher admission probability majors in Tier 2 such as Materials and Chemistry.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2214→2779→2699→3062→3125, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 900 places over the past 4 years. The baseline for 2025 is about 3125. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province for liberal arts/history category: 25 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 23 in 2024, 28 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28, unchanged from 2025, with no change in enrollment quota.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in recent years is approximately 90–101 (around 101 in 2026), with slight fluctuations but overall stability; in 2023, there was a negative incident related to teacher ethics (negative evaluation), and in 2026 reputation data, the university did not enter the list of major public opinion schools; Douyin popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average', with no obvious signs of increased application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are relatively hot/recommended; Accounting/Finance/Auditing are divided and wait-and-see; Tourism Management, Business Administration and other business management majors are clearly discouraged; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025, with an estimated 207,100 history category candidates, slightly expanding the competition base; Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious advantage or disadvantage in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight increase in the total number of history category candidates in Jiangxi Province, and the relatively high popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 3125; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3155, with a range of 2655–3655.
